case_role: Reduced secondary cross-domain replay observation, not a full three-tier replay-stability artifact comparable to Doc 834.

supports: independent inspection of deposited Case B W1-W3 session-level extraction outputs
inspection of pairwise replay comparison records
review of author-observed Backbone Overlap and VOID Coverage ranges
review of domain-specific indicators for high-density economic statistical text
does_not_support: bit-level reproduction of upstream LLM extraction
independent regeneration of W1-W3 from the source document
full executable reproduction of the replay pipeline
automated JSONL parsing across all deposited outputs

document.document_title: Statistical Communiqué of the People's Republic of China on the 2025 National Economic and Social Development
document.role_in_paper: Secondary cross-domain replay observation for Chapter 6 Section 6.9

language_note.schema_language: English field names and canonical runtime status flags
language_note.slot_content_language: Chinese natural-language slot content may appear in MCU payload fields
language_note.comparison_basis: Replay comparison is based on structural coordinates, MCU counts, canonical runtime flags, evidence references, indicator-chain coverage, Relay/VOID/Collision distributions, and author-observed structural-coordinate alignment, not on surface-language similarity.

deposited_output_format.description: The deposited output files preserve the original extraction-output format for each session. They may contain human-readable checklist notes, indicator-chain notes, quota notes, or JSON-compatible records.
deposited_output_format.inspection_note: These files are provided for human inspection of the deposited extraction outputs. They are not intended to be parsed uniformly as strict JSONL streams.
deposited_output_format.counting_note: The reported MCU counts in this artifact are the author-recorded registered MCU counts used in Chapter 6 Section 6.9, not line counts of the deposited output files.

protocol.mcu_schema_reference: Appendix C — MCU Projection Protocol v2.6
protocol.actual_extraction_prompt_disclosure: The exact author-defined extraction prompt is not included. This artifact supports independent inspection of deposited outputs and pairwise comparison records, not full upstream extraction reproduction.
protocol.boundary_note: Appendix C provides the MCU schema, adapter-facing structural terminology, and replay consistency criteria. It is not the executable prompt used to generate the W1-W3 outputs.

inspection_boundary_note: This package is a secondary inspection artifact, not a full executable reproduction pipeline and not a full three-tier replay-stability artifact. It supports inspection of the reduced Case B observation reported in Chapter 6 Section 6.9.
